ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in milliseconds */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the trip */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* ID of the bike used */,
  "member_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member type (registered or casual) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "route" TEXT /* JSON object representing the route taken */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "is_peak_hour" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trip was during peak hours */,
  "price_paid" TEXT /* Price paid for the trip */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_member_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_type_id") REFERENCES member_types ("member_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station (e.g., 15th & Euclid St NW) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bike slots) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the station */,
  "last_known_bike_count" INTEGER /* Number of bikes available at the last known time */,
  "last_known_empty_slot_count" INTEGER /* Number of empty slots at the last known time */,
  "maintenance_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station requires maintenance */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_number" TEXT /* Bike number (e.g., W20409) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the bike (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the bike */,
  "battery_level" TEXT /* Battery level of the bike (if electric) */,
  "is_electric" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bike is electric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bike record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bike record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_types" (
  "member_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member type */,
  "member_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the member type (e.g., Registered, Casual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the member type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "member_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's member type */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_member_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_type_id") REFERENCES member_types ("member_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician performing the maintenance */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the technician */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the technician is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technician record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technician record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User, Technician) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_ratings_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., max_trip_duration, maintenance_threshold) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "dynamic_pricing_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if dynamic pricing is enabled */,
  "price_increase_factor" TEXT /* Factor by which prices increase during peak hours */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
